subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Two missives, sealed with constancy and steadfastness, were received and regarded with the eye of loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق دو قطعه منشور بثبوت و رسوخ ممهور رسید و به عین رأفت ملحوظ افتاد
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @exhortations and counsels
